title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.11.3 - Master Form is now generic: "When attacks or skills without Replay are played, they gain Replay 1" (was: on becoming Unplayable), so it no longer depends on Understudy-specific mechanics.
